name: Honey Oat Biscotti
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F (187°C). Lower temperature to 300°F (149°C) for the second baking.
2. Cream together butter and honey until smooth.
3. Beat in eggs and vanilla extract.
4. Sift flour, cinnamon, baking powder, baking soda, and salt into a bowl; mix well.
5. Gradually stir the dry ingredients into the wet mixture. Add oats and nuts.
6. Shape dough into two logs (10 x 3 x 1-inch) on a greased baking sheet.
7. Bake at 375°F for 12-15 minutes, or until lightly browned. Let cool for 5 minutes.
8. Transfer logs to a cutting board; cut each into half-inch strips and place on a baking sheet.
9. Return to oven and bake at 300°F for 25-30 minutes, or until crisp throughout the strip.
Per serving:
102 calories
1.9 gm protein
14.6 gm carbohydrate
4.4 gm fat (38% of total)
22 mg cholesterol
78 mg sodium
